pending.body: src/cli/project.rs:1912-1928 and 2788-2800 cap summary-inferred sibling detail prefetch at five IDs before detail filtering. When the parent epic detail cannot be loaded and one of those first five summaries is stale-open but actually closed, that sibling is dropped without promoting the sixth open sibling, so the `Nearby work` section can under-report available siblings and hide legitimate planned-elsewhere ownership.

src/cli/project.rs:1863-1966 and 2773-2785 now eagerly and sequentially run `br show` for every dependency/dependent, the parent epic, up to 20 sibling candidates, and a bounded related-work set before rendering the prompt. On moderately connected beads this turns task creation into dozens of subprocesses, making prompt creation latency scale with graph degree and label density.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 9 -> Plan and Implement
